182K86.2K69.6K47.8K71.5K70K527K130938K6.25%0.29%
+25%
Total Elimination
The Hands of the Orchestra take 25% more pure damage.
+25%
Keepers of Balance
When stepping into the material world, heroes heal 25% of their max HP.
+25%
Sparkling Mood
Increases Pet Patronage power by 25%.
+20%
Mischievous Team
Increases Pet power by 20%.
+10%
Power Unleashed
The Hands of the Orchestra take 10% more Magic damage.
+20%
Unbridled Energy
Heroes receive 20% bonus energy when stepping into the material world.
3
At the Speed of Light
The ability that allows heroes to step from one world to another recharges 3 sec faster.
+100%
At the Limit
In the material world, heroes receive 100% of basic attack damage back as healing.
+10%
Through a Prism
When interrupting any of the Soloists' Motifs, heroes are sped up by 10% for 5 seconds.
10
Perfect Storm
When stepping between worlds, all incoming damage to heroes is reduced by 10% for 10 seconds.
-5%
Effective Tactics
The initial damage reduction of Harbinger's Barrier is reduced by 5%.
-2
Secret Weapon
Interrupting the Enervating Motif requires 2 fewer effects of control.

+50%
Power over Life
When stepping into the material world, heroes receive 50% of the healing blocked by Requiem.
+20%
Unbridled Energy
Heroes receive 20% bonus energy when stepping into the material world.
The Chosen Protector
Maestro's Retribution targets the tank first.
+5
Charmer's Skill
Requiem takes 5 sec longer to reach full efficiency.
ondeonde0000002.55M01.86M00.57%
Ralfda1derLlama
103
130
130
130
130
130
67.5K148K125K142K157K120K760K1307.68M45.39%2.35%
+20%
Unbridled Energy
Heroes receive 20% bonus energy when stepping into the material world.
+5%
The Healer's Gift
When heroes step into the material world, they receive 5% more healing for 5 seconds.
3
At the Speed of Light
The ability that allows heroes to step from one world to another recharges 3 sec faster.
+100%
At the Limit
In the material world, heroes receive 100% of basic attack damage back as healing.
+10%
Through a Prism
When interrupting any of the Soloists' Motifs, heroes are sped up by 10% for 5 seconds.
2
Reverie Given Form
When heroes step into the material world, they receive Harbinger's Barrier for 2 sec.
10
Perfect Storm
When stepping between worlds, all incoming damage to heroes is reduced by 10% for 10 seconds.
-2
Secret Weapon
Interrupting the Enervating Motif requires 2 fewer effects of control.

Power Unleashed
The Hands of the Orchestra take 5% more Magic damage.
+5%
Keepers of Balance
When stepping into the material world, heroes heal 5% of their max HP.
+5%
Total Elimination
The Hands of the Orchestra take 5% more pure damage.
+5%
Mischievous Team
Increases Pet power by 5%.
+5%
Sparkling Mood
Increases Pet Patronage power by 5%.
+5
Charmer's Skill
Requiem takes 5 sec longer to reach full efficiency.

Unbridled Energy
Heroes receive 20% bonus energy when stepping into the material world.

Maestro's Retribution targets the tank first.

Effective Tactics

Maestro's Retribution targets the tank first.
+50%
Power over Life
When stepping into the material world, heroes receive 50% of the healing blocked by Requiem.
+2
Pillar of Confidence
Harbinger's Barrier takes 2 sec longer to reach full efficiency.

3
At the Speed of Light
The ability that allows heroes to step from one world to another recharges 3 sec faster.

10
Perfect Storm
When stepping between worlds, all incoming damage to heroes is reduced by 10% for 10 seconds.
+10%
Through a Prism
When interrupting any of the Soloists' Motifs, heroes are sped up by 10% for 5 seconds.
+5%
The Healer's Gift
When heroes step into the material world, they receive 5% more healing for 5 seconds.
2
Reverie Given Form
When heroes step into the material world, they receive Harbinger's Barrier for 2 sec.

-5%
Effective Tactics
The initial damage reduction of Harbinger's Barrier is reduced by 5%.
-10%
Strength in Perseverance
Interrupting the Deafening Motif of the Thundering Horn requires 10% less healing.
2
Reverie Given Form
When heroes step into the material world, they receive Harbinger's Barrier for 2 sec.
3
At the Speed of Light
The ability that allows heroes to step from one world to another recharges 3 sec faster.

+25%
Power Unleashed
The Hands of the Orchestra take 25% more Magic damage.
+25%
Keepers of Balance
When stepping into the material world, heroes heal 25% of their max HP.
+25%
Total Elimination
The Hands of the Orchestra take 25% more pure damage.
+25%
Mischievous Team
Increases Pet power by 25%.
+20%
Unbridled Energy
Heroes receive 20% bonus energy when stepping into the material world.
+100%
At the Limit
In the material world, heroes receive 100% of basic attack damage back as healing.
-10%
The Tireless
The initial healing reduction of Requiem is 10% weaker.
10
Perfect Storm
When stepping between worlds, all incoming damage to heroes is reduced by 10% for 10 seconds.
+5%
The Healer's Gift
When heroes step into the material world, they receive 5% more healing for 5 seconds.
+10%
Through a Prism
When interrupting any of the Soloists' Motifs, heroes are sped up by 10% for 5 seconds.
+50%
Power over Life
When stepping into the material world, heroes receive 50% of the healing blocked by Requiem.
+25%
Sparkling Mood
Increases Pet Patronage power by 25%.
